steps: The pizza is cut into 10 equal slices, so each slice is 1/10 of the pizza. Sam eats 3 slices, so the fraction eaten is 3/10. Check simplification: 3/10 is already in simplest form (3 and 10 have no common factors other than 1). Check options: A) 3/10 matches; B) 1/3 ≈ 0.333, not equal to 0.3; C) 3/7 ≈ 0.429, not equal; D) 30/100 simplifies to 3/10, but not in simplest form as requested; E) 1/10 is too small. Option D is mathematically equivalent but not in simplest form, so only A is fully correct.
